title: Site Documentation Overhaul
summary: Plan to correct and update the SpecGraph docs site to reflect the Postgres migration and new features.
notes: Filed under docs/superpowers/specs with 'design' in filename, resembling a design/spec doc, but content is a documentation-content revision plan (Problem/Design Decisions/Scope) rather than an architectural decision, product requirement, or technical contract; classified as DOC over SPEC due to lack of implementation contracts.
